DISCOVERY 302,DEFENDANT BAYVIEW HUNTERS POINT MULTIPURPOSE SENIOR'S MOTION TO COMPEL PLAINTIFFS ATTENDANCE AT HER DEPOSITION AND REQUEST FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS AGAINST PLAINTIFF AND OR HER COUNSEL OF RECORD. GRANTED. PLAINTIFF HAS NOT PROVIDED THE COURT WITH MEDICAL DOCUMENTATION TO SUBSTANTIATE HER CONTENTION THAT SHE IS UNABLE TO HAVE HER DEPOSITION TAKEN WITH OR WITHOUT ACCOMMODATION. COUNSEL FOR THE PARTIES SHALL PROMPTLY MEET AND CONFER ABOUT DATE(S) FOR PLAINTIFF'S DEPOSITION AND ANY REASONABLE ACCOMMODATIONS THAT PLAINTIFF MAY REQUIRE. THE ACCOMMODATIONS SOUGHT SHALL BE SUPPORTED BY A CERTIFICATION OF PLAINTIFF'S HEALTH CARE PROVIDER WHICH PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL SHALL PROVIDE TO DEFENSE COUNSEL PRIOR TO THE DEPOSITION. THE PARTIES ALSO SHALL MEET AND CONFER ABOUT A STIPULATED PROTECTIVE ORDER TO ADDRESS PLAINTIFF'S PRIVACY CONCERNS. THE DEPOSITION SHALL BE COMPLETED BY OCTOBER 31, 2019. SANCTIONS ARE DENIED. ORDER IS SIGNED. (SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR DETAILS)JUDGE PRO TEM: AARON MINNIS, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. =(302/JPT)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Plaintiffs Attendance At Her Deposition And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Plaintiff And Or Her Counsel Of Record
Off Calendar Aug-23-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Peter Finn, Esq. 415-464-8888x275 of BCB & K() for Defendant.
No other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is Uncontested. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT BAYVIEW HUNTERS POINT MULTIPURPOSE SENIOR's Motion To Compel Plaintiffs Attendance At Her Deposition And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Plaintiff And Or Her Counsel Of Record.

Granted. Plaintiff has not provided the court with medical documentation to substantiate her contention that she is unable to have her deposition taken with or without accommodation. Counsel for the parties shall promptly meet and confer about date(s) for plaintiff's deposition and any reasonable accommodations that plaintiff may require. The accommodations sought shall be supported by a certification of plaintiff's health care provider which plaintiff's counsel shall provide to defense counsel prior to the deposition. The parties also shall meet and confer about a stipulated protective order to address plaintiff's privacy concerns. The deposition shall be completed by October 31, 2019. Sanctions are denied.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge Pro Tem: Aaron Minnis, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not reported. =(302/JPT)
